bio: Akbar Motallebzadeh was an Iranian nuclear scientist killed on 13 June 2025, along with his wife, in Israeli airstrikes on Iran. His killing occurred during the large-scale Israeli military campaign targeting Iran's nuclear infrastructure and personnel. He was among the scientists that the IDF claimed to have eliminated in strikes targeting Iran's nuclear weapons programme.

sources.title: Iranian nuclear scientists killed in Israeli strikes

editorial_notes: Killed 13 June 2025 alongside his wife. Part of June 2025 Israeli strikes campaign.
